src: Silver earrings with a fox head motif at the top, encrusted with small clear crystals. Below are layered, spiraled sections, each shimmering with more crystals. The design is elegant and slightly elongated.
edit: Golden earrings with a fox head motif at the top, adorned with small clear gemstones. Below are layered, spiraled sections, each gleaming with golden tones and more gemstones. The design is opulent and elongated.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The earrings hang against a black background, with the fox heads positioned at the top and the spiral sections descending gracefully. The dark backdrop accentuates the sparkle of the crystals.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The earrings are placed on a textured white background, standing upright with their fox heads at the top. The light background highlights the intricate details and shimmer of the earrings.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The earrings lay horizontally on a floral-patterned surface, showcasing the fox heads and spiral sections with bright illumination. The colorful background adds a contrasting vibrancy to the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The earrings hang against a textured white background, with fox heads prominent at the top. The bright surface enhances the clarity and sparkle of the crystal-encrusted design.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The earrings are resting on a marbled surface, placed side by side. The marbled texture and color draw attention to the detailed craftsmanship and crystal embellishments of the earrings.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The earrings hang vertically in a black box interior, showcasing the fox heads and descending spirals. The dark setting emphasizes the sparkle and elegance of the design.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The earrings are displayed in a black box, vertically aligned with the fox heads at the top. The sleek black environment enhances the brilliance and elaborate design of the earrings.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The earrings hang against a luxury jewelry store setting, with the fox heads and spiral sections appearing opulent. Glass cabinets and soft lighting create a sophisticated backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The earrings are placed on a luxurious textured white surface in the store, standing upright with rich accents. The upscale environment highlights the elegance of the earrings.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The earrings lay horizontally on an ornate jewelry display in the store, showcasing the fox heads and spiral sections. Elegant embellishments and soft lights create a lavish background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The earrings hang against a textured white surface in the luxury store, with fox heads prominent. The opulent environment enhances the refined design of the embellishments.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The earrings are resting on a polished surface in the jewelry store, paired with rich wooden tones. The luxurious surroundings accentuate the detailed craftsmanship and golden gleam.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The earrings hang vertically in a jewelry box within the store, showcasing the opulent fox heads and spirals. The plush setting emphasizes the luxurious nature of the design.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The earrings are displayed in a jewelry box in the store, vertically aligned with a rich backdrop. The lavish environment enhances the brilliance and opulent design of the earrings.
